onboarding.nameHelper: This helps us personalize your suggestions
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Know where and when it's worth going out to sea
onboarding.termsBody: SEA-SEE shows you weather, sea and tide data along with an AI suggestion. It never tells you it is safe to go to sea. The final decision is always yours.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to save your settings and catch history

login.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to your account and check the sea conditions.
login.safetyNoteBody: SEA-SEE never tells anyone it is safe to go to sea. It only gives you data and suggestions. The final decision is always yours.

hero.tagline: Understand the sea • Travel safely • Fish smarter
hero.subtitle: AI-powered fishing guidance for safer seas and better catch.
hero.safetyBadgeBody: We only show data. The final decision is always yours.
hero.feature1Body: Fishing spots on a live map
hero.feature4Body: Best time and place, in one line
